DataRequest.Name: Multiple Distinct IPS Events From Same Src / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects multiple distinct IPS events from the same source IP in a short period of time - the source IP may have been infected
DataRequest.Remediation: Fazer a validação de quem é o atacante, validar pedidos permitidos e notifcar o cliente para bloqueio. Ter atenção se é rede interna ou externa e se há algum imapacto.
DataRequest.DataSource: FortiGate via Syslog, FortiProxy via Syslog, Checkpoint IPS-1 via LEA/Syslog, Palo Alto PAN-OS via Syslog

SubPattern.name: DistinctIPSEvents
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: (eventType CONTAIN "Checkpoint-ips" OR eventType CONTAIN "Cisco_IPS" OR eventType CONTAIN "Corero-SmartWall" OR eventType CONTAIN "FortiGate-ips-" OR eventType CONTAIN "Juniper_IDP" OR eventType CONTAIN "McAfee-Intrushield" OR eventType CONTAIN "Forcepoint-NGFW-" OR eventType CONTAIN "Snort-") AND eventSeverity>=7
